title: Slack add-reaction input
description: Arguments for adding an emoji reaction to a Slack message. Connection credentials and grants are provided by Otto outside this argument object.

channel.description: Real Slack channel ID (C.../G.../D...) containing the message to react to.

timestamp.description: The Slack message timestamp (ts) to react to.

name.description: Emoji name WITHOUT surrounding colons, e.g. white_check_mark.
